description: ICE card on a textured dark-blue denim background. Three booking photos of young men are presented as tilted white-bordered Polaroid-style snapshots across the frame, each captioned in a handwritten-style font with a name: 'WILSON CONSTANZA-GALDAMEZ' (lower left), 'EDIS OMAR VALENZUELA RODRIGUEZ' (upper right, in an orange jail uniform), and 'JONATHAN JOSUE PESQUERA-PUERTO' (lower right). In the upper-left corner a bold red, outlined, slightly 3D headline reads 'MS-13 Terrorists.' The lower-left corner carries the white DHS seal, the 'ICE' wordmark, a red 'LEARN MORE' bar, and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.'
notable_text: MS-13 Terrorists | WILSON CONSTANZA-GALDAMEZ | EDIS OMAR VALENZUELA RODRIGUEZ | JONATHAN JOSUE PESQUERA-PUERTO | LEARN MORE ICE.gov/newsroom
